title: Agents
subtitle: When adding a new Agent, ClawTeams will copy the main Agent's workspace files and runtime auth setup. The configuration can be modified through a dialog.
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent/channel changes may take a moment to apply.

createDialog.title: Add Agent
createDialog.description: Create a new agent by name. ClawTeams will copy the main agent's workspace bootstrap files and runtime auth setup.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from ClawTeams? This permanently deletes the agent and its ClawTeams-managed workspace, runtime, and session files from disk.

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the agent name and manage which channels belong to this agent.
settingsDialog.avatarDescription: Upload a personal photo as avatar
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: Each channel type has a single ClawTeams configuration. Saving a configured channel here moves ownership to this agent.
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this agent yet.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from ClawTeams? This deletes the current channel configuration.
